name: Marketing ROI Calculator
description: Marketing ROI Calculator - Marketing template for analytics professionals
instructions: HOW TO USE THIS ROI CALCULATOR Step 1: Set Up Channel ROI Go to Channel ROI. Enter your spend and revenue for each marketing channel. The template auto-calculates ROI, profit, and cost-per-acquisition for each channel. Step 2: Track Campaign ROI Use the Campaign ROI tab to log every campaign. Enter costs (ad spend, creative, tools, labour) and results (leads, conversions, revenue). ROI is auto-calculated.
